text:
- [escalation] Tavily: Tavily API usage alert that Michael has reached 80% of his June 2026 usage limit.
- [escalation] Tavily: Payment failed notification from Tavily due to expired card or insufficient funds.
- [reply needed] Zamzar Limited: Zamzar requesting updated payment details to resolve a failed payment.
- [reply needed] Andy: Andrew Lang sends a personal reflective email asking about experiences trying to change or save others.
- [reply needed] Barry: Barry shares a NYTimes article about AI in university curriculum that he thought Michael would find interesting.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch shares Wayback snapshots in a Word doc and asks if missing sections of the VG site can be reclaimed.
- [reply needed] "Rob Collins & Esther Wakeman": Rob and Esther confirming lunch plans and asking Michael to print a ticket and return a backpack.
- [scheduling] Peter Nordlund: Peter Nordlund invites Matt and Michael to a June 19 Scriptural Reasoning event and asks if they can bring cut-up fruit.
- [scheduling] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley shares a file with quotes for a Zoom discussion on Saturday, June 27.
- [scheduling] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley apologizes for delay in sharing a chapter from Mark's book for a June 27 discussion.
